title: taraxacum involutum
intro: Taraxacum involutum, also known as the involuted dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high levels of taraxasterol and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum involutum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Taraxacum involutum can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
